# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- Going forward in this repo, the app/product should be referred to as "LLM Think Tank" instead of "Arena" (nomenclature change).

## UI Requirements
- The Status Log UI in LLM Think Tank should have tabs: one for high-level perspective/status events (e.g., "Claude updated their perspective") and another for raw API responses/errors to aid debugging.
- Conversation persistence should retain all data needed to fully recreate conversations after restart.
